reviews.comment:
Un lugar cómodo para tomar algo, juntarse a charlar tranqui en medio del caos de la Costanera y la terminal.

(Translated by Google)
A comfortable place to have a drink, gather around, and chat quietly amidst the chaos of the Costanera and the terminal.

reviews.comment:
Tiene un Buen servicio con  limpieza y  orden buena atención por parte del personal de playa el minimarket medio pobre cuenta con aire para inflar cubiertas un lujo en la Argentina de hoy

(Translated by Google)
It has good service, cleanliness and order, and good attention from the beach staff. The minimarket is somewhat basic but has air for inflating tires, a luxury in Argentina today.
